prompt: Build me a settings page at src/routes/settings/+page.svelte. Three fields stacked vertically: display name (text), email (text), notifications enabled (toggle). A primary submit button at the bottom. The form should look polished and theme through (light + dark). Just give me the +page.svelte file.
assertions: uses Field.Root + Label for each input (rule 8)
uses bind:checked on the toggle, not bind:value (rule 1)
no class= passed to DryUI components (rule 4)
dryui check passes with zero errors
